app.name: 3NIGMA°
app.tagline: Every day, a key. Every key, a truth.

faqs.question: How does 3NIGMA° work?
faqs.answer: You receive a daily enigma, solve it, then validate to move forward in the story.

faqs.question: How can I change my preferences?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings to manage your preferences and account.

faqs.question: How do I enable notifications?
faqs.answer: Enable the daily reminder in Settings.

faqs.question: I don't receive notifications, what can I do?
faqs.answer: Check notification permissions in your browser and device settings.

faqs.question: How can I share my progress?
faqs.answer: From the success screen, you can continue the investigation and follow your progress.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: 3NIGMA° provides daily enigmas. By using the app, you accept these terms.

account.title: 2. User account
account.content: Some features require an account. You are responsible for your information and account security.

usage.title: 3. Service usage
usage.content: The app must be used for personal, non-commercial purposes.

forbidden.title: 4. Prohibited behavior
forbidden.content: It is forbidden to use the app for illegal purposes, disrupt it, or access other users' data.

ip.title: 5. Intellectual property
ip.content: All content in the app, including texts, visuals, and features, is protected by copyright.

data.title: 6. Personal data
data.content: Your data is processed in accordance with applicable regulations.
data.content4: You can exercise your rights at any time.

liability.title: 7. Liability
liability.content: The app is provided “as is”. The publisher is not liable for indirect damages related to use.

termination.title: 8. Termination
termination.content: You can delete your account at any time. The publisher may suspend accounts for violations.

changes.title: 9. Changes
changes.content: These terms can be updated at any time. The update date will be shown in the app.

law.title: 10. Governing law
law.content: These terms are governed by French law.

contact.title: 11. Contact
contact.content: For any questions, contact us at:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_text1: This policy explains how your personal data is collected and used.
privacy.data_intro: We only collect data required to operate the service:
privacy.legal_usage: Data is only used to provide and improve the service.
privacy.share_intro: Some data may be processed by technical providers:
privacy.retention_text: Data is kept as long as your account is active.
privacy.security_text: Technical and organizational measures protect your data.
privacy.cookies_text: Technical cookies may be used to run the app.
privacy.rights_text: You can request access, modification, or deletion of your data.
privacy.transfer_text: Some data may be processed outside the EU with appropriate safeguards.
privacy.changes_text: This policy may be updated at any time.
privacy.contact_text: For any questions about your data:
